news.headline: Hong Kong police arrest 5, recover nearly HK$100 million in stolen gold bars
news.summary:
Hong Kong police have arrested five people and recovered nearly HK$100 million (US$12.7 million) worth of gold stolen in a suspected deception case, in which a “buyer” allegedly worked for a group that seized the haul before fleeing.

news.headline: Buffy the Vampire Slayer actor Nicholas Brendon dies aged 54
news.summary: Brendon died of "natural causes", his family said in a statement, remembering him as "passionate" and "sensitive".

news.headline: Iran fires missiles at UK-US base in Indian Ocean’s Chagos Islands, 4,000km away
news.summary:
Iran launched ballistic missiles at the joint US-UK military base in Diego Garcia on Friday, showing a missile capability that goes beyond what Tehran was known to have possessed.

news.headline: US jury finds Elon Musk misled investors during Twitter purchase
news.summary: Jury finds that two tweets posted in May 2022 by Musk contained false statements.

news.headline: US to send more Marines to Middle East as Trump hints at wind-down
news.summary: Three weeks into an escalating war in the Middle East, Iran threatened to expand it's retaliatory attacks to include recreational and tourist sites worldwide, as the US announced it was sending more warships and Marines to the region.

news.headline: China decries ‘unjust war’ on Iran as it calls for immediate ceasefire
news.summary:
China called for a halt to the “unjust war” in Iran in a phone call between top diplomats on Friday and expressed willingness to work with France to prevent other nations from being drawn into the conflict.
